research_gate: C5 capability-free closure evidence is recorded against exact C4. The retained source, two evidence-only successor transitions, one exact closure-orchestration transition, hosted Linux attestation, read-only ProofReceipt integration, independent reviews, pre-transition run-87b9301f9bb54b2d9b72767643c7ed9b and post-transition run-8296afcac8e949cca8b6a3693d1dfc3f remain cryptographically replayable. This holding state grants no Forge port, promotion, runtime, product-policy, cache or C6 authority.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized recorded C5 significance/scheduler capability-free closure evidence only. Exact dependency C4. C5 remains the sole master-program cursor pending a separate C6 transition. No C3B, C6 activation, C7, broad G1 closure, runtime controllers, runtime executors, cache mutation, storage mutation, product weights, AI generation, rendering implementation, filesystem, network, process, Companion, Greenfield, visual assets, promotion authority or Kernel mutation.
context_health: C5 is recorded as the capability-free reference proof and remains the sole executing/active master-program waiting cursor. The isolated game-facing proof contract, not Forge, reproduced semantic SHA-256 88e2be61586e728613fe2c7bf5b947074459fc5f63d6e5f13d4f4648e64624eb on hosted Linux. Exact successor classifiers distinguish the independently executed source from later evidence-only and orchestration changes. C6 remains proposed, gated and inactive.

macro_findings: The owner retained the canonical broad route C4 then C5 then C6 then C7 then G1-CLOSEOUT then R1.
C4 is verified and complete; C5 is the sole active item. C6-C7, broad G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 remain unchanged and gated.
The current C5 closure requires exactly generation, simulation, AI, physics, animation, audio, rendering and streaming from one shared significance truth.
C5 portability is verified only for the isolated capability-free game-facing proof contract; Forge remains the PC-first factory and was not ported.

The read-only ProofReceipt binding and exact retained-successor classification are independently accepted; C5 closure evidence is recorded without modifying frozen game-facing proof bytes or activating runtime behavior or C6.

The desktop integration is test-only: it records the retained hosted receipt and semantic digest idempotently without changing canonical object, event or candidate counts.
The existing legacy significance/scheduler receipt test remains intact; the C5 test separately binds the strict 38-field CBOR evidence.
Focused desktop tests, the complete 43-test desktop suite, ProofReceipt verification, scheduler readiness verification, module-context verification and independent hostile review pass.
Four registered full-gate diagnostics exposed stale exact successor tuples; permissive wildcard repairs were rejected and reverted after hostile review.

The exact adapters preserve all historical C4 proof blobs and the C5 source snapshot, classify two evidence-only C5 transitions plus one exact closure-orchestration delta, and authenticate the recorded C5 tuple through strict hostile-tested evidence.

exit_criteria.label: C5 depends exactly on verified C4 and imports no C3B, later-system, storage or runtime authority.
Every named generation, simulation, AI, physics, animation, audio, rendering and streaming obligation is mapped to one shared significance truth.
Deterministic dispatch, admission, budget, fallback, cancellation, fairness, starvation and thrash hostiles are frozen before source.
A separately authorized C5 implementation, focused regressions, independent review and one registered full Forge gate pass without activating C6.

unresolved_risks: A later C6 transition must not reinterpret recorded C5 evidence as runtime, product-policy, promotion, cache or Forge-port authority.
